name: journal-bank-reconciliation
description: Deterministic journal-to-bank reconciliation guided by Codex.

interface.shortDescription: Reconcile bank statements with journal or ledger exports in Italian, English, French, or German.
interface.longDescription: Codex workflow for deterministic bank-to-journal reconciliation. Codex inspects local bank and journal files, asks only for non-inferable mappings or assumptions, runs deterministic scripts, reviews exceptions, and explains limits. The plugin normalizes rows, filters sample movements when supplied, performs staged amount/date/reference/beneficiary/description matching, and automatically writes the natural full package: CSV/XLSX/JSON outputs, audit, diagnostics, review notes, and Codex review, without direct model API calls from scripts.
defaultPrompt: Use Journal-Bank Reconciliation on the bank files and journal/ledger file I provide.
Infer language and column mappings where possible, ask only for essential ambiguities, then run deterministic reconciliation and prepare the complete natural review package.
Do not make direct OpenAI API calls from the plugin scripts; use Codex for review judgment and deterministic scripts for extraction/matching.
